title: Design System: Mithun Rathinasamy Personal Website

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Theme control and short interface transitions.

motion.name: signal-field
motion.purpose: Bounded hero shader, disabled for reduced motion.

components.name: Theme Button
components.description: Circular sun/moon control with explicit current-state iconography.
components.html: <button class="ds-theme" aria-label="Switch theme"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"/><path d="M12 2v2M12 20v2M4.93 4.93l1.42 1.42M17.66 17.66l1.41 1.41M2 12h2M20 12h2M4.93 19.07l1.42-1.42M17.66 6.34l1.41-1.41" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></button>

components.name: Product Screen
components.description: Thin screen surround that preserves the screenshot's native aspect ratio.

narrative.overview: Swiss-like precision with one live technical surface: a restrained topographic shader in the hero. Light and dark modes are equally authored.
keyCharacteristics: Tinted neutral surfaces with deep teal-black structure.
A single coral status signal used sparingly.
Flat hierarchy through tone, rules, and spacing.
One bounded shader field with an accessible static fallback.

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Coral remains below ten percent of any viewport; its rarity makes it meaningful.

rules.name: The One-Voice Rule
rules.body: Use scale and spacing within Inter before introducing another font family.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Do not add a shadow unless it communicates a real interaction or physical edge.

dos: Do preserve the native aspect ratio of every product screenshot.
Do keep motion isolated to the hero and theme-state feedback.
Do preserve complete keyboard operation and reduced-motion behavior.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS landing-page gradients or glassmorphism.
Don't use ornamental device mockups or crop product screenshots.
Don't use a generic unlabeled switch for theme selection.
